center.name: 喀麥隆火山鏈
center.summary: 喀麥隆火山鏈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Cameroon olive pigeon、Mountain sooty boubou、Cameroon olive greenbul等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cameroon olive greenbul (Phyllastrephus poensis), is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in the Cameroon line (including Bioko)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Cameroon line from Bioko, Equatorial Guinea north to Mount Oku, Cameroon and the Obudu Plateau, Nigeria. In the Cameroon highlands, it is found in montane forests, usually above 600 m in elevation.
